texto: Everyone absolutely knows what a strawberry tastes like, even if you are allergic to them. Everyone absolutely knows what the toilet flushing sounds like. Everyone absolutely scratches their mosquito bites. And I know that I was absolutely ready to die. This wasn't a cry for help. I didn't want to be saved. I was ready to call it quits. Done. Terminado.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Kimberly Russell: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Everyone absolutely knows what a strawberry tastes like, even if you are allergic to them. Everyo…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, death, suicide pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de luto e suicide.
